channel.title: web on The Coach Cave
channel.description: Recent content in web on The Coach Cave

item.title: HSCTF - HS Verifier
item.description: This challenge was part of a CTF event hosted by HackerSchool. Challenge statement Being a web challenge, a website is provided in the statement, alongside the application’s source code and a Dockerfile. The website asks for two links, and after clicking “Go!”, displays a diff between the two pages. Difference between example.com and github.com In the source code we can find the following endpoints for the application:
